headline: Here's What to Expect From Progressive Corporation's Next Earnings Report
summary: Progressive Corporation will release its second-quarter earnings soon, and analysts anticipate a single-digit profit dip.

headline: Revisiting Stock Picks Intel, Progressive, Bristol Myers Squibb
summary: Looking back at past stock picks is important because it helps investors understand what worked, what didn’t, and why.  The insurance stock is down 19% over the past year but has gained 8% over the past month.
